call_transcript.description: Full verbatim or paraphrased call transcript between CSR/nurse and member
call_transcript.format_guidance: Multi-turn dialogue with AGENT: and MEMBER: turns, 4-12 lines, ends with bracketed summary and CSR_NOTES field

ivr_result_code.description: Structured IVR event log with member interaction codes
ivr_result_code.format_guidance: JSON-like object with: ivr_session_id, member_id, gap_id, measure_id, call_date, ivr_tree_path (array of options selected), raw_result_code, duration_seconds, transferred_to

csr_note.description: Short free-text note entered by a CSR after a call or interaction
csr_note.format_guidance: 1-4 sentences of plain prose; may include shorthand codes like WN, VM, SCHED; often has date/member context

web_form.description: Structured web portal submission or partial submission from member self-service
web_form.format_guidance: JSON-like object with: submission_id, member_id, gap_id, measure_id, submitted_at, form_version, fields_completed, completion_status (COMPLETE/PARTIAL/ABANDONED), member_responses (object)

conditions: Service is confirmed completed with supporting claim, lab result, or verified provider documentation
closed.notes: Self-reported completion WITHOUT claim verification does NOT qualify for closed status

conditions: Member was reached (responded=true) but gap cannot yet be credited
Includes: scheduled_appt, refused, callback_requested, language_barrier, opted_out, already_completed_unverified, pending_followup, partial_web_submission, web_self_report, engaged_sms
attempted_not_closed.notes: Most common outcome in outreach campaigns; gap stays open in system

conditions: Outreach was attempted but member was NOT reached (responded=false)
Includes: left_voicemail, no_action, mail_delivered (no reply), SMS no-response, SMS invalid number
open_no_contact.notes: Gap remains open; member not engaged

conditions: The record itself is not processable for gap management
invalid.notes: TRICKY EDGE: If member is deceased, ALL open gaps for that member should be invalidated

tricky_edge_cases.description: Member says 'I already had that done' but no claim on file. Do NOT close gap. Use DISP-COMP-UV with care_gap_status=attempted_not_closed.
tricky_edge_cases.common_error: Incorrectly marking as closed based on member assertion alone

tricky_edge_cases.description: IVR raw_code shows 'Member confirmed appointment scheduled' but transcript or CSR note indicates member actually refused.
tricky_edge_cases.common_error: Trusting IVR code over narrative content

tricky_edge_cases.description: Wrong number at first seems like wrong_number (invalid) but call with next of kin reveals member is deceased.
tricky_edge_cases.common_error: Coding as DISP-WN instead of DISP-EXCL

tricky_edge_cases.case: Partial web form with self-reported completion
tricky_edge_cases.description: PARTIAL_SUBMIT status but member_responses field contains claim of service completion.
tricky_edge_cases.common_error: Treating PARTIAL_SUBMIT automatically as no-data; missing the embedded self-report

tricky_edge_cases.case: Language barrier with appointment booked by interpreter
tricky_edge_cases.description: Language barrier encountered, transferred to interpreter who then booked an appointment.
tricky_edge_cases.common_error: Coding as language_barrier only and missing the appointment booking

tricky_edge_cases.description: Member replied YES to SMS but prompt was ambiguous — could mean consent to be called OR confirmation of service completion.
tricky_edge_cases.common_error: Treating REPLIED_YES as service confirmation and closing the gap
